input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.7.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.7.4
            TITLE: addenda apply only to the competition at which they are submitted.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.7.4: Addenda apply only to the competition at which they are submitted.
S.3.7.4 Addenda apply only to the competition at which they are submitted.

final_answer: Addenda apply only to the competition at which they are submitted.
